title: Sentence Transformation: Reported Speech in Depth

tasks.instruction: Przeczytaj zdania. Wykorzystując wyrazy podane wielkimi literami, uzupełnij każde zdanie z luką tak, aby precyzyjnie oddać sens zdania wyjściowego. Nie zmieniaj formy podanych wyrazów. W każdą lukę możesz wpisać maksymalnie pięć wyrazów, wliczając w to wyraz już podany.

items.original: "I have finished my homework," said Mia.
items.transformed: Mia said that she _________ her homework.

items.original: "Don't touch the wet paint," the teacher told us.
items.transformed: The teacher told us _________ the wet paint.

items.original: "Where do you live?" Tom asked me.
"Will you help me tomorrow?" she asked him.
items.transformed: She asked him if he _________ her the next day.

items.original: "You should see a doctor," my friend said to me.
"I'm sorry I broke your phone," said Leo.
